evidence: Bounded probes to `https://www.education.nh.gov/`, `/school-and-district-profiles`, and `/find-school-or-district` returned HTTP 403, so no reviewed district- or county-grade education routing chain is preserved on disk.

The packet's current VR root `https://dhhs.new-hampshire.gov/rehab` does not resolve, and bounded probes to likely official Bureau of Vocational Rehabilitation paths on `education.nh.gov` returned HTTP 403, so no reviewed first-party VR or Pre-ETS artifact is preserved on disk.

The legacy county-office evidence still depends on DOI-derived rows, while bounded probes to `https://www.dhhs.nh.gov/contact-us/district-offices` and `/contact-us` returned HTTP 403 and did not preserve a reviewed county-owned local routing directory.
